# When writing commit messages, never include "Claude", "AI", "generated by", or any indication that the code was AI-assisted. Write commits in first person as the developer.
- ASLA CLAUDE ETİKETLEME COMMİT MESAJLARINA
- benimle her zaman türkçe konuş

# Proje Mimarisi
go-core: Enterprise-grade Go uygulama iskeleti.
- **Framework:** Fiber v2 (HTTP), gRPC (RPC)
- **Veritabani:** PostgreSQL (GORM ORM)
- **Mesaj Kuyrugu:** RabbitMQ
- **Cache:** Redis
- **Auth:** JWT (HS256) + Casbin RBAC + TOTP 2FA
- **Monitoring:** Prometheus + OpenTelemetry + Jaeger
- **Bildirim:** Email, Push (FCM), Webhook, In-App (SSE)

# Dizin Yapisi
- `cmd/` — Uygulama giris noktalari (api, grpc)
- `internal/core/` — Config, logger, errors, validation
- `internal/infrastructure/` — DB, email, metrics, tracing, server, push, webhook
- `internal/modules/identity/` — Kullanici, auth, roller, izinler, API key, audit log
- `internal/modules/notification/` — Bildirimler, SSE, template, streaming
- `internal/grpc/` — gRPC server ve servisler
- `internal/middleware/` — Auth middleware

# Kurallar
- Gorev tamamlandiginda ilgili planlama/task md dosyalari silinmeli
- Gereksiz dokumantasyon dosyasi olusturma
